title: ononis sicula subsp. polyphylla
intro: Ononis sicula subsp. polyphylla, also known as the Sicilian restharrow or Italian restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic qualities, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ononis sicula subsp. polyphylla include its ability to aid in the management of urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Ononis sicula subsp. polyphylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
